user.title: GARO Entity Balance
user.description: Enter the connection details for your GARO Entity Balance load balancer. Credentials are printed on a sticker on the physical device.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read the meter. Default 15 s. The P1 port typically updates every few seconds so there is no benefit going below 5 s.
data_description.ignore_tls_errors: Skip certificate validation. Safe to enable for local network devices with self-signed certificates.
data_description.use_http: Only use if the device does not support HTTPS.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host address and network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check username and password (password is case-sensitive, use lowercase).
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read the meter. Default: 15 s.
